channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection, 4th April
item.description:
Innsworth Lane Sports Ground, Longlevens. The 'What 3 Words' location is ///examiner.slopes.courage The ordnance survey map reference is: 51.883919,-2.213313 Council Litter Bin Ref: 0254 Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection. Two bags, one containing general litter and the other cans/plastic bottles for recycling. Also one nitrous oxide cylinder.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Innsworth Lane, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Litter picking bags ready for collection

item.title: Potholes and depression on Hewlett Road, 4th April
item.description:
Two potholes and a larger dip/depression in the road, outside 65 Hewlett Road. Causing cars to bounce and needs addressing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Hewlett Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wobbling slab at end of 6 Nettleton Road driveway, 4th April
item.description:
A wobbling/raised slab at the bottom of 6 Nettleton Road driveway (what three words motel.lied.horses). Needs to be repaired it is a trip hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Nettleton Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The footpath has been diverted quite a long and is not shown on the map. The indicated route is completely overgrown, blocked by a fence and the finger post has been removed., 4th April
item.description:
Footpath ZCH1 where it joins Hayden Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown into property, 4th April
item.description:
On the corner over village road and hayden Lane bedlam forge ... this tree has caused my elderly mother to fall break her pelvis as all the seasonal stuff that falls in to her garden..... very over grown into her property
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Hayden Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fence with nails protruding, 4th April
item.description:
There is a fence panel leaning into the footpath with nails protruding dangerously near head height.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Noverton Avenue, Noverton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken dangerous path, 4th April
item.description:
The whole path. It's lifted, paving slabs have been broken and split and are raised. The area is incredibly dangerous for any pedestrians and could cause harm.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Gwernant Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Missing & Broken paving slabs, 4th April
item.description:
Uneven paving slabs, Broken paving slabs & Missing slab which causes trip hazards for members of public. Previously reported but no fix implemented.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 137, High Street, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sharp pieces of metal debris, 4th April
item.description:
A large quantity of sharp metal pieces. There’s also some rubber pieces mixed in. It looks like it might be the remains of a fire as some appears melted. It is spread several metres along the edge of the road going down the incline towards the mini roadabout. I litter pic this area but have been told I shouldn’t litter pick on roads plus those are sharp and quite large/beavy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Malvern Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken slab, 4th April
item.description:
Repair not completed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barriers and signage left, 3rd April
item.description:
There are barriers, signage and a metal fence left strewn blocking the pathway by the underpass

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Continuous bad parking, 3rd April
item.description:
Cars parking on both sides of the road leaving tight gaps to get through. On one side is a Wain homes van and on the other side is a cleaning company’s van. A fire engine wouldn’t get through.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Court Road, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars in considerately parking on pavement, 3rd April
item.description:
Lyndley chase bishops cleeve cars parking overhanging public pavement making access for pedestrians difficult

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lyndley Chase, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree growing over public footpath, 3rd April
item.description:
Entrance to Lyndley chase from stoke road trees/hedge severely overgrown blocking public footpath from first residential dwelling needs cutting back

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Orchard Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: Tarmac has broken around the manhole and the sharp edges are showing. Dangerous to car drivers, 3rd April
item.description:
Drain cover has edges showing where tarmac has broken You can clearly see from the photo

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 326, Hatherley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Both footpaths along arden road unsafe - uneven, 3rd April
item.description:
Need resurfacing urgently- trip hazard!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Arden Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot holes end of hall road near moorend rd not fixed, 3rd April
item.description:
See above. Reported several times and not fixed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Hall Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham

item.title: 9-11 hall rd lots of potholes still not fixed, 3rd April
item.description:
See above. Road needs resurfacing!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Hall Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham

item.title: Fly tipped chair, 3rd April
item.description:
Chair dumped on grass verge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Farmington Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
